testcases.input: n = 4, edges = [[1,2],[2,4],[1,3],[2,3],[2,1]], queries = [2,3] Output: [6,5] Explanation: The calculations for incident(a, b) are shown in the table above. The answers for each of the queries are as follows: - answers[0] = 6. All the pairs have an incident(a, b) value greater than 2. - answers[1] = 5. All the pairs except (3, 4) have an incident(a, b) value greater than 3.
